name: zotero-research-tools
description: Personal Codex plugin for searching, reading, summarizing, citing, and organizing Zotero library items through Zotero MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Search and manage Zotero via MCP.
interface.longDescription: Packages a local Zotero MCP launcher with a research skill for reading metadata, full text, notes, annotations, tags, and collections. Treats llm-for-zotero as a separate Zotero desktop add-on and can diagnose saved MinerU Markdown cache visibility.
